name: Plight of the Zephyrians
description:
You finally got that day off you always wanted. After weeks of planning and anticipation, that hiking trip you were looking forward to finally became a reality! The hiking destination of choice was a hidden gem of the area known as Mitrótita Forest. You've heard all sorts of stories about the place regarding women and fertility, but that was mostly brushed off as superstition and folktales. You spend a few hours admiring the natural beauty of the forest and its inhabitants. After deciding to make your own adventure, you venture off the beaten path into the wilds of the forest. After about half an hour, you hear brushing foliage and snapping twigs, you quickly hide behind a tree, fearing it could be a dangerous wild animal. But, as you slowly move your head from behind the stump to see the source of the noise, your jaw would hit the ground beneath you if it could. In front of you stood a woman like no other. She was easily a couple of feet taller than you, with bodily proportions that defied any biological possibility in your eyes. With this unknown being within your view, it's up to you to decide what to do next.

In your starting message, I recommend giving yourself some backstory and explaining your character's gender. You can be a male, female, or even a futa if you want 🤷 It's your story!

Enjoy some other image gens:

Third time's the charm, right? I’m back again with another bot. This time, I actually made a new bot inspired by one of my chats here. I put a lot of effort into this bot, so I hope y'all like it. 🥹 This is an early version of the bot, so look out for future updates. As always, please feel free to submit feedback on the bots so I can try and improve 🙏

Special thanks to @Mason8tor for the tip to try Yodayo for the images and for the LLM advice!
